v0.0.1.description:
## First Official Release!
This release includes:
- An exe build for windows users.
- Gecko Code based vanilla unlock blocking over the old savestate based vanilla blocking.
- A revamped tracker window.
- Stabilisation Updates.

*Linux users, download the source code here to run the client.*

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.0.1-pre.2...v0.0.1
v0.0.1.title: MKWii AP Release Version 0.0.1

v0.0.1-pre.0.description:
# The first pre-release!
Just an initial release so you guys can start playing :)

For the client just download the source code, that has everything you need. 

I do want to note that this version is practically a public playtest, it will break. Please read the install instructions in the [README.md](https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/blob/main/README.md) as they are quite particular.

## What is available in this pre-release?
- Fully completable from start to finish.
- Character, Cup, Vehicle and Kart/Bike Swap unlocks.
- Grand Prix ranking location checks (per CC).
- Vanilla unlock blocking (kinda, using savestates).
- Complete [x] amount of cups on [y]CC for Goal options.
- Useless, non-functional filler items :D

## What is NOT available in this pre-release (but is planned for the future)?
- Item unlocks
- Proper built in vanilla unlock blocking
- Functional, functional filler items
- Traps
- Individual race location checks
- Time trials location checks

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/commits/v0.0.1-pre.0
v0.0.1-pre.0.title: MKWii AP Pre-Release Version 0.0.1

v0.0.1-pre.2.description:
# Hotfix for initial Pre-Release
- Fixed dolphin memory file being bloated with unused references.
- Added Hotkeys.ini file selection if file isnt automatically found.

If you are looking for the client download, just download the source code, no building needed.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.0.1-pre.1...v0.0.1-pre.2
v0.0.1-pre.2.title: MKWii AP Pre-Release Version 0.0.1 Hotfix 2

v0.0.2.description:
## Release Version 0.0.2
This release is focussed on a plethora of QoL improvements as well as stabilisation improvements.

### Changelog
- Moved away from gecko code based vanilla item blocking to DME based vanilla item blocking.
- Improved hooking stabilisation and consistency.
- Added the option to run Dolphin manually.
- Made the savefile selection manual as the auto detection was causing a lot of issues and was not working well.

_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.0.1...v0.0.2
v0.0.2.title: MKWii AP Release Version 0.0.2

v0.0.2-h1.description:
## Release Version 0.0.2 "Hotfix" 1
Doesn't really fix anything, but rather adds an optional reporting/logging feature to help with future debugging.
To **enable** logging add `"reporting": true` to `mkwii_ap_config.json`, if left out of config or set to `false` reporting will be **disabled**.
Reports will be saved to `report.log`.

_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.0.2...v0.0.2-h1
v0.0.2-h1.title: MKWii AP Release Version 0.0.2 "Hotfix" 1

v0.0.2-h2.description:
## Release Version 0.0.2 Hotfix 2
- Fixes generation issues with the APWorld regarding victory reachability.
- Fixes location capitalization issues.
- Started including adding version name to windows build zip.

**This version requires the NEW APWorld, the old one will no longer work with this new client.**

**If you are looking for the reporting patch for the OLD APWorld refer to [v0.0.2 hotfix 1](https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/releases/tag/v0.0.2-h1).**

_Linux users, download the source code here to run the client._

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/toent/Archipelago-MKWii/compare/v0.0.2-h1...v0.0.2-h2
v0.0.2-h2.title: MKWii AP Release Version 0.0.2 Hotfix 2
